{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Weeping Dragon madra
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan used scales of [[Weeping Dragon madra]] to patch broken channels.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
